subcodes.title: Ziyarat li-Avvali man aman
subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O Lord my God! I bear witness unto Thee on this Day, the Day of Friday, and all things testify that verily Thou art God, there is no God but Thee, alone, without peer [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله الامنع الاقدس. سبحانک اللهم یا الهی لاشهدنک یومئذ یوم الجمعه و کل شیء علی انک انت الله لا اله الا انت وحدک لاشریک لک
subcodes.subjects: @belief and denial, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @fire and light; fire and water, @nearness and remoteness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
